program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Running a conference call with international partners -- agenda, connection, follow-up and the present perfect -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Conference Calls with Partners
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 10 -- Conference Calls with Partners

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sofia. I called you, but the connection was bad. Have you sent the summary? I have already read the agenda, and I have some questions. Please call me back and follow up. I want to attend the next meeting too. Thank you, and speak soon.

Good morning, everyone. Thank you for attending the call today. I have prepared the agenda, and I have sent the summary. Have you read it yet? Please put your microphone on mute when you are not speaking. After the call, I am going to follow up by email. Let us start now. Thank you.
